name: ifo Business Climate (Industry+Trade)
notes: Headline ifo composite (Manufacturing + Trade) in index form. History back to 01/1991 via Sectors sheet.

name: ifo Business Situation (Industry+Trade)
notes: Current-assessment component of the Industry+Trade composite. Index form.

name: ifo Business Expectations (Industry+Trade)
notes: Forward-looking component of the Industry+Trade composite. Index form.

name: ifo Business Climate (Industry+Trade balance)
notes: Balance form (% positive - % negative) of Industry+Trade Climate.

name: ifo Manufacturing Climate
notes: Manufacturing sector climate balance. History from 01/1991.

name: ifo Services Climate
notes: Services sector climate balance. Series starts 04/2005.

name: ifo Trade Climate
notes: Combined Wholesale + Retail trade climate balance.

name: ifo Trade Situation
notes: Combined Wholesale + Retail trade situation balance.

name: ifo Trade Expectations
notes: Combined Wholesale + Retail trade expectations balance.

name: ifo Business Uncertainty Index
notes: Disagreement / dispersion of survey responses; higher = more uncertainty. Limited history.

name: ifo Business Cycle Tracer Probability
notes: Cycle-tracer model probability of expansion phase. Starts 01/2005.
